description: Province name from the 161-district boundary file.
District name from the 161-district boundary file.
Mean grid-cell posterior PfPR using exact polygon-cell overlap fractions and geodesic cell-area weights; nearest valid land cell used only when the district has no valid raster support.
Area-weighted mean of grid-cell posterior 2.5% quantiles; not a district-level credible limit.
Area-weighted mean of grid-cell posterior 97.5% quantiles; not a district-level credible limit.
District raster area with valid values used for continuous-result aggregation; zero indicates nearest-cell fallback.
Distance from the district point-on-surface to the nearest valid prediction cell when fallback was required.
Longitude of the fallback prediction cell.
Latitude of the fallback prediction cell.
Area-weighted mean probability that grid-cell PfPR exceeds the configured 20% threshold.
District raster area with valid values used for exceedance and decision aggregation; zero indicates nearest-cell fallback.
Proportion of district raster area classified Yes at p*=0.80.
Proportion of district raster area classified Uncertain.
Proportion of district raster area classified No at p*=0.80.
area_weighted_exact or nearest_valid_cell_fallback for decision outputs.
Class obtained by applying p*=0.80 to the district mean of grid-cell exceedance probabilities.
Most common grid-cell decision class by district raster area; ties are resolved in favour of Yes, then No, then Uncertain.
